DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN THAT HER EARNINGS ARE REQUIRED FOR THE SUPPORT OF HER AND HER FAMILY, PURSUANT TO CCP 706.051(B). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-24-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ROBIN D. WRABLEWSKI'S MOTION TO VACATE THE RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ENTERED ON JUL-18-2011 IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS TIMELY UNDER CCP 683.170(B), AS IT WAS FILED WITHIN 30 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THE NOTICE OF RENEWAL ON OCTOBER 24, 2013. FOLLOWING FIDELITY CREDITOR SERVICE, INC. V. BROWNE (2001) 89 CAL.APP.4TH 195, 203-204, THE TRIAL COURT CAN VACATE A RENEWED JUDGMENT BASED ON FAILURE TO SERVE THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT PROPERLY. THE UNOPPOSED DECLARATION OF MS. WRABLEWSKI DEMONSTRATES THAT THE 2192 DIAMOND STREET WAS NOT HER RESIDENCE OR USUAL PLACE OF ABODE AS OF JUNE, 2001. (SEE DECLARATION OF WRABLEWSKI, 2-4.) CONSEQUENTLY, SUBSTITUTED SERVICE WAS NOT PROPERLY COMPLETED UNDER CCP § 415.20(B). (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Deft'S Motion To Vacate The Renewal Of Judgment Entered On Jul-18-2011
Off Calendar Dec-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT ROBIN D. WRABLEWSKI'S Motion To Vacate The Renewal Of Judgment Entered On Jul-18-2011 is Granted. No opposition filed. Defendant's request for judicial notice is granted. Defendant's motion is timely under CCP 683.170(b), as it was filed within 30 days of service of the notice of renewal on October 24, 2013. Following Fidelity Creditor Service, Inc. v. Browne (2001) 89 Cal.App.4th 195, 203-204, the trial court can vacate a renewed judgment based on failure to serve the summons and complaint properly. The unopposed declaration of Ms. Wrablewski demonstrates that the 2192 Diamond Street was not her residence or usual place of abode as of June, 2001. (See Declaration of Wrablewski, 2-4.) Consequently, substituted service was not properly completed under CCP 415.20(b). (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Oct-30-2013 Text Ruling

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos

MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT ROBBIN WRABLEWSKI's Claim Of Exemption IS Granted. Defendant has shown that her earnings are required for the support of her and her family, pursuant to CCP 706.051(b). Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
